question:
Why is holding a grudge often said to be more harmful to the person holding it?
A) It maintains a state of internal bitterness that prevents personal healing and emotional forward-movement.
B) It physically curses the person they are holding the grudge against.
C) It causes immediate amnesia.
D) It makes the person unable to feel physical pain.
